kicker: RAD SAFETY // JURISDICTION · NRC · AGREEMENT STATES · RECIPROCITY

beats.narration: Every curie of iridium you touch is possessed under one specific license, from exactly one regulator. Cross the wrong line and you are unlicensed.

payload.title: ONE LICENSE, ONE REGULATOR
payload.sub: Plan jurisdiction the way you plan dose.

beats.narration: Federal authority follows the material, not the radiation. The NRC governs byproduct sources, or hands that power to about forty Agreement States. Machines stay with states.

payload.heading: Who regulates what, and where
payload.note: NRC ↔ ~40 AGREEMENT STATES · X-RAY MACHINES = STATE REGISTERED

beats.narration: So one truck can carry two rulebooks. The iridium projector answers to a materials license; the X-ray crawler is registered with the state, never the NRC.
Crossing into NRC jurisdiction, your license travels by reciprocity. File Form 241 three days ahead, pay the fee, respect the one-eighty-day cap.

chips.s: License copy plus fee, 3 days ahead
Enclaves in your own state need it too

beats.narration: Cross the line without filing and you are operating unlicensed — the fastest route to civil penalties and a stop-work order. Check jurisdiction every bid.

payload.sub: No filing, no shot — reciprocity is activated by paperwork, never assumed.
